positive: A stylized, intricate nocturnal forest scene with whimsical elements. The central composition features glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, giant stylized ferns, and interconnected roots forming an organic pattern. The palette is dominated by deep indigo blues, vibrant neon greens, electric purples, and accents of gold leaf shine. The artwork should have a clean, high-contrast silhouette style, resembling sophisticated linework and etched engraving, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Strong depth and visual flow, emphasizing natural magic and mystery. Central framing, minimalist background texture.
